title: T3 Ingestion: LLM-judge calibration (Gap B) — score the design judge against David's mocha-census labels
prompt: Close eval-architecture Gap B in ~/dev/ad/apps/dark-factory: the factory's LLM-judges (design-lint, census/triage class) run uncalibrated while David's human design labels sit unused as a calibration set. Build tools/judge-calibration/ — a stdlib-only calibrate.py (--sample / --score / --self-test), a pinned JUDGE-PROMPT.md, a README — then run ONE blind calibration pass: stratified 60-shot sample (20 per tier, seed 42) from tools/mocha-census/out/ratings/round-02.json (159 entries, love/good/average, every one with a PNG in out/shots/ — READ-ONLY, David's data), judged by in-session sonnet subagents reading the PNGs (NO Anthropic API, NO claude -p, NO SDK — ever; the pin is the recorded session-model string + JUDGE-PROMPT.md sha256). Score agreement with --score: exact %, adjacent %, linear-weighted Cohen's kappa, confusion matrix, verdict band (kappa >=0.6 calibrated-trusted / >=0.4 calibrated-caution / else not-trusted); plus a descriptive F3/F4 flag spot-check of design-lint's rubric against David's free-text labels (~8 mappable shots; skip if <4). A low kappa is a successful result, not a failure — report it honestly; NEVER iterate the judge prompt against the same sample to chase a better number (Goodhart). Ship: tools/judge-calibration/CALIBRATION.md (pinned judge identity, metrics, verdict band, round-03 drift warning, residual gap: census/triage TEXT judges stay uncalibrated — no human-labeled text set exists), out/calibration-<date>.json committed, ONE status line appended to docs/eval-architecture.md Gap B section, ONE pointer (or not-trusted warning) line in tools/design-lint/README.md. Commit and push dark-factory. Read and execute the war game at backlog/wargames/T3-17-judge-calibration.md. Follow its moves in order; on any failure signal apply the counter-move; on any abort condition stop and write needs-decision/.
verify: In ~/dev/ad/apps/dark-factory: python3 tools/judge-calibration/calibrate.py --self-test exits 0 printing 'self-test: 4/4 cases ok' (incl. the known fixture: kappa 0.5, exact 66.7%, adjacent 88.9%); calibrate.py imports stdlib only and contains no Anthropic API usage. out/sample.json has ~60 items with zero 'rating' keys (blind) and zero missing PNG paths; out/verdicts.json has >=48 in-vocabulary verdicts under a judge_meta carrying judge_model, prompt_sha256, and an explicitly no-API mechanism. out/calibration-<date>.json has kappa in [-1,1], a confusion matrix summing to n, a verdict in {calibrated-trusted, calibrated-caution, not-trusted}, truth_source, and a flag_spot_check block (cases or an explicit skipped reason). CALIBRATION.md exists stating the verdict band, the pinned judge, the tier-drift warning, and the census/triage residual gap. grep 'judge-calibration/CALIBRATION.md' hits exactly once in docs/eval-architecture.md and once in tools/design-lint/README.md. Negative: git status shows zero changes under tools/mocha-census/ (David's ratings/shots untouched); no PNGs were written under tools/judge-calibration/; eval-architecture.md diff is ~1 added line. If verdict was not-trusted, engine/store/needs-decision/wg-t3-17-judge-calibration.json exists with the three-option question (informational — ticket still completes). The feat(tools) commit is pushed and the tree is clean of this ticket's files.
